kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Aldric, Godfrey, and Rowan go with Kingsford, 7 coins, and 9 coins, in some order.
Between Bridgegate and Kingsford, one goes with 9 coins and the other with 11 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Blacksmith goes with 3 coins; Potter goes with Countess; Prince goes with 11 coins.
Exactly two of (the members of the Clothiers' Guild, Aldric, and the artisan with 11 coins) belong to the Hill Ward.
Godfrey goes with exactly two of Tanner, Kingsford, Countess, and 11 coins.
Either Cedric belongs to the Clothiers' Guild or both members of the Market Ward belong to the Clothiers' Guild (but not both).
Tanner, Millpond, Sheriff, and 3 coins belong to different artisans.
Rowan's levy is between the artisan serving the Countess and the Mason.
Tanner goes with at least two of Godfrey, Millpond, Sheriff, and 7 coins.
Bishop goes with exactly three of Edmund, Blacksmith, Southgate, and 5 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Cody, Royce, and Wade go with Pinehollow, 14 lb, and 15 lb, in some order.
Between Cedarmere and Pinehollow, one goes with 15 lb and the other with 16 lb.
Exactly one of these is true: Bass goes with 12 lb; Crappie goes with Jig; Swimbait goes with 16 lb.
Exactly two of (the members of the Catfish Family, Cody, and the catch with 16 lb) belong to the East Watershed.
Royce goes with exactly two of Perch, Pinehollow, Jig, and 16 lb.
Either Esther belongs to the Catfish Family or both members of the North Watershed belong to the Catfish Family (but not both).
Perch, Stillwater, Wobbler, and 12 lb belong to different catches.
Wade's weight is between the angler using the Jig and the angler who landed the Catfish.
Perch goes with at least two of Royce, Stillwater, Wobbler, and 14 lb.
Buzzbait goes with exactly three of Mabel, Bass, Willowmere, and 13 lb.
